name: Operation on Resource in Wrong Phase of Lifetime
description: The product performs an operation on a resource at the wrong phase of its lifecycle (initialization, use, or release), leading to unexpected behaviors such as use-after-free, double-free, or premature release vulnerabilities.
detection_pattern: STORAGE or STRUCTURAL node is operated on by a TRANSFORM node after a CONTROL[release] or TRANSFORM[free] node has already terminated the resource's active phase, or before TRANSFORM[initialize] has completed
